attempts.reflection: You need to ensure you have the necessary materials before attempting to craft more complex items. Specifically, you should craft oak planks first by using the oak logs you mined. Then, craft sticks from the oak planks before trying to make a crafting table. After obtaining a crafting table, you can then proceed to craft other items like sticks and finally the smoker. Correctly order your actions to avoid running into resource shortages and repeated failed attempts.
